strengths: Strong de-escalation: apologized, identified self/company, offered keep-it-quick or callback instead of immediate DNC.
After caller re-engaged, delivered recording + plan-availability and continued the appointment correctly.
Did not push products while the caller was still frustrated.
issues: Opening line ('Now is a perfect time…') is slightly pushy before any rapport.
Transcript ends mid-qualify (callback permission) so full compliance spine is only partially demonstrated.
summary: Correct angry-caller handling: empathize, soft re-ask permission, then resume compliance steps without DNC’ing too early. Outcome incomplete-but-continuing matches expectation. Pass.
